external_services.service_name: Advance Transmittal of Civil Documents to Philippine Statistics Authority
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Advance Transmittal of Civil Documents to Philippine Statistics Authority
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Individuals who seek transmittal of recently registered document ahead of regulatory monthly transmittal

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Copy of COLB, COM, COD, COFD (1 original, 2 photocopies)
Advance transmittal letter (1 original, 2 photocopies)
Proof of Urgency (1 original, 2 photocopies)
Valid ID of claimant (1 photocopy)
If representative: Authorization letter (1 original) and Valid ID

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to Window 2 and submit requirements for evaluation
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.4: Receive requirements, check sufficiency, conduct interview, and issue Order of Payment

steps.client_step: 2. Present Order of Payment and pay at the Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 3. Present Official Receipt and claim endorsement
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.6: Prepare endorsement and true copies, sign documents, segregate, advise on courier transmittal, and provide follow-up instructions
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant I, City Civil Registrar

external_services.service_name: Application for Delayed Registration of Certificate of Death/ Fetal Death
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Delayed Registration of Certificate of Death_ Fetal Death
external_services.who_may_avail: Immediate family members of the deceased

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Duly accomplished Form No. 103 (COD/COFD) – 4 original copies
PSA No Record of Death; Certification from Funeral Service Provider; Notarized Affidavit of Delayed Registration; Notarized Joint Affidavit of Two Witnesses
checklist_of_requirements.source: PSA / Funeral Provider / City Legal Office / Notary Public

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Certification from Cemetery or Burial Permit

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to Window 5 and submit Municipal Form No. 103 and requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Receive forms, double-check attachments, and encode COD information

steps.client_step: 2. Get the claim stub
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.2: Issue claim stub (10-day wait) and conduct mandatory Posting

steps.client_step: 3. Proceed to releasing window and show claim stub
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.3: Assign registry number, approve/sign COD, and segregate documents
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Registration Officer IV, City Civil Registrar

steps.client_step: 4. Claim the registered owner's copy of death certificate
steps.agency_action: 4. Release COD/COFD at Window 5

external_services.service_name: Application for Delayed Registration of Certificate of Live Birth (COLB)
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Delayed Registration of Certificate of Live Birth (COLB)
external_services.who_may_avail: Parents/guardians, attendants at birth, or persons of legal age not yet reported

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: MF 102 (COLB) – 4 original copies; Negative PSA Birth Result; Barangay Residency Cert; 2x2 Photo; National ID
checklist_of_requirements.source: LCRO Window 3 / PSA / Barangay / Requesting Party

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: If Married: Marriage Certificate; If Not Married: Notarized Affidavit of Paternity and AUSF
checklist_of_requirements.source: LCRO / PSA / City Legal Office / Notary Public

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Two documentary proofs of identity (Baptismal, Immunization, School records, Philhealth, SSS, etc.)
checklist_of_requirements.source: Church / Health Center / Schools / Government Agencies

steps.client_step: 1. Submit MF 102 and requirements at Window 3
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.4: Receive/check forms, encode COLB, issue claim stub, and advise on notarization

steps.client_step: 2. Submit notarized supporting documents at Window 3
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.3: Accept claim stub, mandatory 10-day posting, and issue new claim stub

steps.client_step: 3. Present claim stub and pay required fees
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.7: Locate files, check completeness, issue Order of Payment (if AUSF), receive payment, assign registry number, and sign COLB
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV/VI, City Treasurer, City Civil Registrar

steps.client_step: 4. Claim registered owner's copy
steps.agency_action: 4. Release COLB at Window 3

external_services.service_name: Application for Delayed Registration of Certificate of Marriage
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Delayed Registration of Certificate of Marriage
external_services.who_may_avail: Solemnizing officers, contracting parties, or authorized representatives

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Certificate of Marriage (4 original); Church Certification; CENOMAR; Sworn Statement of cause of delay; Notarized Affidavit of Delayed Registration
checklist_of_requirements.source: LCRO Window 5 / Church / PSA / Notary Public

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Birth certificates of children; Joint Affidavit of 2 Witnesses; Marriage License; Wedding pictures
checklist_of_requirements.source: PSA / LCRO / City Legal / Requesting Party

steps.client_step: 1. Submit MF 97 and requirements at Window 5
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Receive forms, check attachments, and encode COM data

steps.client_step: 2. Get the claim stub
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.2: Issue claim stub and 10-day mandatory posting

steps.client_step: 3. Proceed to releasing window and show claim stub
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.2: Assign registry number and sign/approve document
steps.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV, City Civil Registrar

steps.client_step: 4. Claim the registered owner's copy
steps.agency_action: 4. Release marriage certificate

external_services.service_name: Application for Issuance of Marriage License
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Issuance of Marriage License
external_services.who_may_avail: Single individuals/ contracting parties who want to get married

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Personal appearance; Valid IDs (at least 1 resident of Lipa); Birth or Baptismal Certificate; CENOMAR (within 6 months); Marriage Compliance Certificate (RA 10354); Pre-Marriage Counseling Certificate (PD 965)
checklist_of_requirements.source: Requesting party / LCRO / PSA / Church / CSWD / City Health Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: If 18-20: Notarized Parental Consent; If 21-24: Notarized Parental Advice; If parents cannot give consent: Notarized Affidavit of Assumption of Responsibility
If Widower: Death Certificate; If Annulled: Court Decision with Finality and Annotated Marriage Certificate
For Foreigners: Legal Capacity to Contract Marriage; Valid Passport; If Divorced: Divorce Decree
checklist_of_requirements.source: Embassy / Requesting Party / Foreign Trial Courts

steps.client_step: 1. Get Municipal Form No. 90 at Window 4
steps.agency_action: 1. Give the application form to clients

steps.client_step: 2. Fill out form and attach requirements
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Receive/check form; 2.2. Issue Order of Payment

steps.client_step: 3. Pay fee at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 3. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 4. Submit OR and secure documents for notarization
steps.agency_action: 4. Advise clients on notarization

steps.client_step: 5. Submit notarized MF No. 90
steps.agency_action: 5.1. Check completeness; 5.2. Record and issue Claim Stub; 5.3. Posting; 5.4. Sign License
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, City Civil Registrar

steps.client_step: 6. Return and claim license
steps.agency_action: 6. Release the marriage license

external_services.service_name: Application for Legitimation of Children by Subsequent Marriage (RA No. 9858)
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Legitimation of Children by Subsequent Marriage
external_services.who_may_avail: Parents who seek legitimation of a child/ children born out of wedlock

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Birth Certificate of child; Marriage Certificate of parents; CENOMAR/Advisory on Marriages (both parents) – 1 original, 4 photocopies each
Notarized Acknowledgement of Paternity; Notarized Joint Affidavit of Minority (if parents under 19 at birth)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements for evaluation at Window 2
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.4: Receive requirements, check sufficiency, interview, and issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Assistant IV

steps.client_step: 2. Pay fees at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 3. Submit OR and receive claim stub
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.8: Issue claim stub (2-day wait), verify records, retrieve docs, assign instrument number, prepare COLB/Annotation/Certifications, sign, and segregate
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Assistant IV

steps.client_step: 4. Claim processed documents
steps.agency_action: 4.1-4.4: Sign registry book, double check docs, release, and transmit to PSA
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Assistant IV

external_services.service_name: Application for Proper Registration of Wrongly Registered Documents
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Proper Registration of Wrongly Registered Documents
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Individuals seeking transmittal of recently registered document ahead of schedule

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Transmittal letter (1 original)
Birth certificate (1 original, 1 photocopy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements for evaluation at Window 2
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.4: Receive requirements, check sufficiency, interview, and issue Order of Payment

steps.client_step: 2. Pay fee at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 3. Return to window and present OR
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.4: Advise client, verify entries, approve/annotate documents, and process for endorsement

steps.client_step: 4. Claim processed documents
steps.agency_action: 4.1-4.4: Sign logbook, check completeness, release, and transmit to PSA

external_services.service_name: Application for Timely Registration of Certificate of Death/ Fetal Death
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Timely Registration of Certificate of Death_ Fetal Death
external_services.who_may_avail: Immediate family member who has knowledge of the death

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: MF 103 (COD/COFD) – 4 original copies
Certification; Certificate of Embalmer; Post-Mortem Death Certificate (if applicable)
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Health Office / Funeral parlor

steps.client_step: 1. Submit MF No. 103 and requirements at Window 5
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.6: Receive form, check attachments, encode data, assign registry number, approve/sign, and segregate
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, City Civil Registrar

steps.client_step: 2. Claim registered owner's copy at Window 5
steps.agency_action: 2. Release the COD/COFD

external_services.service_name: Application for Timely Registration of Live Birth
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Timely Registration of Live Birth
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2G – Government to Businesses
external_services.who_may_avail: Parents/guardians, hospital authorities, or persons of legal age not yet reported

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: MF 102 (COLB) – 4 original copies (computerized/typewritten in black ink)
If Married: Marriage Certificate; If Not Married: Notarized Affidavit of Admission of Paternity and AUSF
checklist_of_requirements.source: LCRO / PSA / City Legal Office / Notary Public

steps.client_step: 1. Submit MF No. 102 and requirements at Window 3
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.6: Receive/check form, encode data, assign registry number, approve/sign, and segregate

steps.client_step: 2. Claim registered owner's copy at Window 3
steps.agency_action: 2. Release the birth certificate

external_services.service_name: Application for Timely Registration of Marriage
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Timely Registration of Marriage
external_services.who_may_avail: Solemnizing officers, contracting parties, or document owners

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: MF 97 (Certificate of Marriage) – 4 original copies
If outside church: Notarized request; If under Art. 34: Notarized Affidavit of Cohabitation

steps.client_step: 1. Submit MF No. 97 and requirements at Window 5
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.6: Receive/check form, encode data, assign registry number, approve/sign, and segregate
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, City Civil Registrar

steps.client_step: 2. Claim registered owner's copy at Window 5
steps.agency_action: 2. Release the marriage certificate

external_services.service_name: Endorsement of Civil Documents to Philippine Statistics Authority
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Endorsement of Civil Documents to Philippine Statistics Authority
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Persons with negative PSA records or blurred copies needing second endorsement

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Negative copy and Local copy of COLB/COM/COD/COFD (1 original, 2 photocopies each); Endorsement letter; Proof of Urgency; Valid ID
checklist_of_requirements.source: PSA / LCRO / Requesting party / Government Agency

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: If representative: Authorization letter; Valid ID; Contact details
checklist_of_requirements.source: Document owner / Requesting party / Government Agency

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements for evaluation at Window 2
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Receive requirements, check sufficiency, and issue Order of Payment

steps.client_step: 2. Pay fee at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 3. Return to window after payment
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.6: Prepare endorsement, pull out/photocopy OCRG copy, sign, segregate, and advise on PSA procedure and electronic transmission timeline
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Assistant IV, City Civil Registrar

external_services.service_name: Out of Town Registration of Certificate of Live Birth
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Out of Town Registration of Certificate of Live Birth
external_services.who_may_avail: Parents/guardians, attendants at birth, or persons of legal age not yet reported

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Properly accomplished MF No. 102 (4 original, black ink); Negative Result PSA (2 photocopies); Barangay Residency Cert (2 photocopies); 2x2 photo; National ID (2 photocopies)
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Civil Registrar's Office / PSA / Barangay / Requesting Party

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: If Married: Marriage Certificate; If Not Married: Affidavit of Admission of Paternity, AUSF, and Affidavit of 2 Disinterested Persons
checklist_of_requirements.source: LCRO / PSA / City Legal Office / Notary Public

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Supporting docs for identity/birth (Baptismal, Immunization, School records, Philhealth, SSS, NBI/Police Clearance, etc.)
checklist_of_requirements.source: Church / Health Center / School / Gov Agencies

steps.client_step: 1. Submit MF No. 102 and requirements at Window 3
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.4: Receive form, evaluate via interview, issue claim stub (5 working days), and encode/prepare COLB

steps.client_step: 2. Present and surrender claim stub at Window 3
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.3: Accept stub, assist with signatures, and advise on notarization

steps.client_step: 3. Present notarized COLB and documents to LCRO
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.4: Issue truthfulness certification, advise on release notification, transmit to Provincial Statistics Office (10-day wait), and process application
steps.person_responsible: City Civil Registrar, Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Assistant IV, Registration Officer II (PSO)

steps.client_step: 4. Present claim stub at Window 3 to claim owner's copy
steps.agency_action: 4.1-4.4: Accept stub, locate docs, facilitate signing of receiving copy, and release original COLB

external_services.service_name: Petition for Change of First Name (Republic Act No. 9048)
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Petition for Change of First Name (Republic Act No. 9048)
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Persons wishing to change first name/nickname based on grounds in RA 9048

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: PSA Birth Certificate (1 original, 2 photocopies); LCRO Certified Birth Certificate (2 copies); Affidavit of Newspaper clippings (2 photocopies)
Supporting docs (Baptismal, School records, Medical, Employment, SSS/GSIS, Voter's record, Philhealth, NBI/Police clearance, Valid IDs)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements for evaluation at Window 2
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Receive forms, evaluate/interview, and issue Order of Payment

steps.client_step: 2. Pay amount at City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 3. Submit Official Receipt to receiving clerk
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.5: Fill out details, draft petition, sign 4 copies, advise on notarization, issue follow-up stub, and post notice (10 days)

steps.client_step: 4. Receive follow-up stub and wait for decision
steps.agency_action: 4.1-4.11: Prepare posting cert, publish once a week for 2 weeks, verify/stamp, sign petition, decide, transmit to PSA (6 months), and prepare Finality/Annotation
steps.person_responsible: City Civil Registrar, Registration Officer II/IV, PSA Legal Service

total.processing_time: Approved: 6 months, 20 days, 1 hour and 48 minutes; Denied: 6 months, 20 days, 1 hour and 52 minutes

external_services.service_name: Petition for Correction of Clerical or Typographical Error in the Civil Register (Republic Act No. 9048)
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Petition for Correction of Clerical or Typographical Error in the Civil Register (Republic Act No. 9048)
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Persons with clerical or typographical errors on civil registry documents

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: PSA Copy of Birth/Death/Marriage (1 original, 2 photocopies); LCRO Certified Copy (2 copies)
Supporting docs (Baptismal, School records, Medical, Employment, SSS/GSIS, Voter's record, Philhealth, NBI/Police clearance, Valid IDs)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements for evaluation at Window 2
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Receive forms, evaluate/interview, and issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Registration Officer IV

steps.client_step: 2. Pay amount at City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 3. Submit Official Receipt to receiving clerk
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.5: Fill out details, draft petition, sign 4 copies, advise on notarization, issue follow-up stub, and post notice (10 days)

steps.client_step: 4. Receive follow-up stub and wait for decision
steps.agency_action: 4.1-4.10: Prepare posting cert, verify/stamp, sign petition, decide, transmit to PSA (6 months), and prepare Finality/Annotation
steps.person_responsible: City Civil Registrar, Registration Officer II/IV, PSA-OCRG

steps.client_step: 5. Return on given date and claim annotated document
steps.agency_action: 5. Release annotated document

total.processing_time: Approved: 6 months, 10 days, 1 hour and 52 minutes; Denied: 6 months, 10 days, 2 hours and 7 minutes

external_services.service_name: Petition for Correction of Clerical or Typographical Errors in Day and Month in the Date of Birth or Sex of a Person (Republic Act No. 10172)
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Petition for Correction of Clerical or Typographical Errors in Day and Month in the Date of Birth or Sex of a Person
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Persons with clerical or typographical error in the entry of the day and month of date of birth or sex

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: PSA COLB, COD, or COM (1 original, 2 photocopies); LCRO COLB (2 certified true copies); NBI & Police Clearance (2 photocopies each)
Affidavit of Publication with newspaper clippings (1 original, 2 photocopies); Medical records (old/new lab results); Medical Certificate from gov physician (stating no sex change/transplant)
Supporting docs: Baptismal, Confirmation, Form 137/TOR, Employment records, SSS/GSIS, Voter's Record, Philhealth, Valid IDs

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements at Window 2
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Receive forms, evaluate/interview, and issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Registration Officer II/IV

steps.client_step: 2. Pay at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 3. Submit OR to receiving clerk
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.4: Instruct form filling, draft petition, sign 4 copies, advise on notarization, and issue follow-up stub

steps.client_step: 4. Submit Affidavit of Publication after prescribed period
steps.agency_action: 4.1-4.2: Issue follow-up stub and post Notice (10 days)

steps.client_step: 5. Return on follow-up date
steps.agency_action: 5.1-5.8: Prepare posting cert, verify/stamp, sign petition, transmit to PSA (6 months), and prepare Finality/Annotation
steps.person_responsible: Registration Officer II/IV, City Civil Registrar, PSA Legal Service

total.processing_time: Approved: 6 months, 20 days, 1 hour and 13 minutes; Denied: 6 months, 20 days, 1 hour and 16 minutes

external_services.service_name: Petition to Use the Surname of the Father (AUSF)
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Petition to Use the Surname of the Father (AUSF)
external_services.who_may_avail: Children born of unmarried parents

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Birth Certificate (PSA original + 9 photocopies; LCRO original + 9 photocopies); Notarized Affidavit of Admission/Acknowledgement of Paternity (3 original)
Notarized Affidavit to Use the Surname of the Father (executor: Mother if ≤6; Child with mother attestation if 7-17)
Valid ID (1 original, 4 photocopies); Joint Affidavit of Minority (if parents <19 at birth)
checklist_of_requirements.source: Requesting Party / Gov Agency / Notary Public

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements at Window 2
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Receive requirements, check sufficiency, and issue Order of Payment

steps.client_step: 2. Pay at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: AUSF: P200.00; CTC of COLB: P150.00

steps.client_step: 3. Submit OR and receive claim stub
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.9: Issue claim stub (2-day wait), verify records, retrieve docs, assign instrument number, prepare annotation/certifications, sign, and segregate
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Assistant IV, City Civil Registrar

steps.client_step: 4. Claim processed documents
steps.agency_action: 4.1-4.4: Sign registry book, double check docs, release, and transmit to PSA
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Assistant IV

external_services.service_name: Registration of Admission/ Acknowledgement of Paternity
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Registration of Admission_ Acknowledgement of Paternity
external_services.who_may_avail: Illegitimate children wishing to be recognized by the father

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Birth Certificate (PSA original + 9 photocopies; LCRO original + 9 photocopies)
Notarized Affidavit of Admission or Acknowledgement of Paternity signed by father (3 original); Valid ID of father (2 photocopies)
checklist_of_requirements.source: City Legal Office / Notary Public / Requesting Party

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements at Window 2
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Receive requirements, check sufficiency, and issue Order of Payment

steps.client_step: 2. Pay at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 3. Submit OR and receive claim stub
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.9: Issue claim stub (2-day wait), verify database, retrieve docs, assign instrument number, prepare annotation/certifications, sign, and segregate
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Assistant IV, City Civil Registrar

steps.client_step: 4. Claim processed documents
steps.agency_action: 4.1-4.4: Sign registry book, check completeness, release, and transmit to PSA
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Assistant IV

external_services.service_name: Request for Certifications and Certified True Copies of Birth, Death and Marriage Certificates
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Certifications and Certified True Copies of Birth_ Death and Marriage Certificates
external_services.who_may_avail: All individuals

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: If owner: Valid ID (1 photocopy); If representative: Authorization letter (original), Owner's Valid ID (1 photocopy), and Representative's Valid ID (1 photocopy)
checklist_of_requirements.source: Requesting party / Document owner / Gov Agency

steps.client_step: 1. Submit request form at Window 1
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.4: Receive form, check veracity, verify database, and issue Order of Payment

steps.client_step: 2. Pay at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Local: P50.00; Abroad: P100.00; Visa: P200.00

steps.client_step: 3. Submit OR at Window 1
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.5: Locate records, scan/print, sign, seal, and release to release window
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, City Civil Registrar

steps.client_step: 4. Claim document at Window 2
steps.agency_action: 4.1-4.3: Sign registry book, double check, and issue document

total.fees: Local: P50.00; Abroad: P100.00; Visa: P200.00

external_services.service_name: Request for Registration of Court Decrees and Orders
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Registration of Court Decrees and Orders
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Any person subject of the court decree/order

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Registered in Lipa: Certified true copies of court decision/order with Certificate of Finality (3 sets); Affidavit of delayed registration (3 original)
Lipa Decision/Registered Outside: CTC of decision with Finality (4 sets); Affidavit of delayed registration (3 original)
Outside Decision/Registered in Lipa: CTC of decision with Finality (3 sets); Affidavit of delayed registration (3 original)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements at Window 2
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Receive requirements, check sufficiency, interview, and issue Order of Payment

steps.client_step: 2. Pay at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 3. Return to window and present OR to receive claim stub
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.8: Photocopy OR, issue follow-up stub, process documents (5-day wait), record entry, prepare verification letter, sign, and send to court via courier
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, City Civil Registrar

external_services.service_name: Supplemental of Entries in Legal Instrument
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Supplemental of Entries in Legal Instrument
external_services.who_may_avail: Parents/guardians, concerned parties, or document owners of legal age

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Authenticated copy of civil document needing supplemental report (Birth, Marriage, Death/Fetal Death) – 1 original, 2 photocopies
Duly notarized Affidavit of Supplemental Report – 4 original copies
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Legal Office or Notary Public

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: 3 documentary evidence to support the supplemental report – 2 photocopies each

steps.client_step: 1. Submit complete requirements at Window 2 for evaluation
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Receive requirements, check sufficiency, and issue Order of Payment

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the fee at the City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 3. Submit Official Receipt at Window 1
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.8: Locate/verify records, retrieve documents, assign instrument number, prepare annotations and Certifications (Forms 1A, 2A, 3A), sign CTCs, and segregate documents
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Registration Officer II/IV, Administrative Assistant IV

steps.client_step: 4. Claim processed documents for PSA submission
steps.agency_action: 4.1-4.4: Sign receiving registry book, double check documents, release, and transmit to PSA Legal Instruments Division
